annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Ark. Code Ann. § 16-65-114(a)(1) — 5.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Arkansas’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at codes.findlaw.com. Not legal advice.
